stories.title: D11 Moving Orton Academy Into Trailblazer Elementary for 2026-27

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: D11 is moving Orton Academy — a dyslexia-focused charter school — into Trailblazer Elementary for the 2026-27 school year. Trailblazer has ~337 empty seats. Some parents say they were blindsided. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Orton Academy serves grades 2-8, about 120 students with dyslexia. Trailblazer currently enrolls ~220 of its ~600-student capacity. D11 says it's an efficient use of space. Parents have questions. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D11 Moving Orton Academy Into Trailblazer Elementary for 2026-27 School Year

stories.title: CPSC Recalls Vevor Baby Swings Over Safe Sleep Violation

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: RECALL ALERT: Vevor baby swings (models BB501K, BB702A, BB005K) are recalled. Sold Jan-Aug 2025 on Vevor.com and Amazon for $65-$80. Incline too steep — violates Safe Sleep for Babies Act. Stop use now. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: If you have a recalled Vevor baby swing, contact the company for a full refund: (855) 599-6320 or recalling@vevor.com. Inclined sleepers have been linked to 94+ infant deaths since 2005. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Vevor Baby Swings Recalled Over Dangerous Incline Angle — What Parents Need to Know

stories.title: YCXXKJ Baby Bath Seats Recalled — Tip-Over Drowning Risk

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: RECALL: ~8,960 YCXXKJ baby bath seats (model YD-1958) sold on Amazon May 2024-Oct 2025 for $34-$40. Tip-over drowning risk. Comes in blue, gray, pink, yellow. Stop use. Refund: bentalkhere@outlook.com #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Nearly 9,000 YCXXKJ Baby Bath Seats Recalled for Tip-Over Drowning Risk

stories.title: COS Parks Hit 22.5 Million Visits in 2025 — Budget Cuts Proposed for 2026

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: Colorado Springs parks, trails, and open spaces logged 22.5 million visits in 2025 — with an estimated $91.6M economic impact. The parks system's 2026 budget faces a proposed $2M cut. Worth knowing. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: Patty Jewett: 119,000 golf rounds. Valley Hi: 62,000. Garden of the Gods: 8,000 ft of new waterline. COS parks are working hard — and families are showing up. Now comes budget season. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: COS Parks Logged 22.5 Million Visits in 2025 — and a Budget Cut Looms for 2026

stories.title: AAP Screen Time Guidelines Put Quality and Context Over the Clock

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: The AAP says no screens before 18 months, 1 hr/day max for ages 2-5 — but the bigger point is quality over quantity. Co-view with your kids, talk about what you're watching, and model the habits you want them to have. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: AAP Screen Time Guidelines: Why Quality and Context Matter More Than the Clock
